title: viola phalacrocarpa
intro: Viola phalacrocarpa, also known as the yellow viola, is a perennial flowering plant in the violet family. It is native to the mountainous regions of Japan and has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antibacterial properties. The health benefits of Viola phalacrocarpa include its ability to alleviate symptoms of anxiety and insomnia, as well as its potential to reduce inflammation and improve wound healing. In herbal preparations, Viola phalacrocarpa is often used to make teas, infusions, and tinctures that can be consumed to harness its medicinal properties.
